# External Deep Research

Cross-cutting fractal-governance research that does not fit any single hub doc. Imported from the ZAO OS V1 research library.

| File | Topic | Source |
|------|-------|--------|
| [fractal-governance-external-deep-research.md](fractal-governance-external-deep-research.md) | DEEP-tier external research on the wider fractal-governance landscape - sources beyond ZAO's immediate lineage, comparison with non-Fractally governance experiments, academic literature on small-group consensus | ZAO research Doc 705 |

## How to use

- **Want sources we have not already cited?** This doc points to external academic + community sources not duplicated elsewhere.
- **Writing the literature-review section of the whitepaper?** Start here.
- **Debating whether ZAO's positioning claims are defensible?** This is the breadth-check.
